summary: actions/checkout@v4 (line 6) should pin to commit SHA per security best practices; Invoke-LicenseCheck.ps1 missing Set-StrictMode for consistency. Otherwise: strong design with testable interfaces (mock-data injection), modular functions, proper error codes (0/1/2), semantic gate logic. Harness could tighten rsync fallback & assertion loops. Would ship with minor hardening.
